headline: Carrier Global (CARR) Valuation Check After Data Center Order Surge And Q1 Earnings Beat
summary: Carrier Global (CARR) is back in focus after Q1 2026 results beat Wall Street estimates, paired with significant growth in data center orders that already cover this year’s US$1.5b sales target. See our latest analysis for Carrier Global. At a share price of US$67.22, Carrier has logged a 21.25% 30 day share price return and a 25.60% year to date share price return. The 3 year total shareholder return of 63.52% contrasts with a 3.25% decline over the last year, suggesting that shorter term...
